name: Gussari @Ignister
name_jp: グッサリ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>＠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>イグニスター
desc: When a Link Monster is destroyed by battle: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. When your Link Monster destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can inflict damage to your opponent equal to that destroyed monster's original ATK. When an attack is declared involving a Link Monster you control and an opponent's monster: You can banish this card from your GY; the ATK's of those monsters become 3000. You can only use each effect of "Gussari @Ignister" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When a Link Monster is destroyed by battle: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. When your Link Monster destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can inflict damage to your opponent equal to that destroyed monster's original ATK. When an attack is declared involving a Link Monster you control and an opponent's monster: You can banish this card from your GY; the ATK's of those monsters become 3000. You can only use each effect of "Gussari @Ignister" once per turn.
eff: When a Link Monster is destroyed by battle: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. When your Link Monster destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can inflict damage to your opponent equal to that destroyed monster's original ATK. When an attack is declared involving a Link Monster you control and an opponent's monster: You can banish this card from your GY; the ATK's of those monsters become 3000. You can only use each effect of "Gussari @Ignister" once per turn.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
